expectations.text: Review identifies path traversal vulnerability from unsanitized filename parameter
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-23: '[SECURITY][error] Path traversal vulnerability — attacker-controlled filename escapes UploadDir' — references line 18-19, gives ../../etc/passwd example, provides HasPrefix fix

expectations.text: Review flags that errors from exec, Glob, Stat, or Remove are silently ignored
expectations.evidence: Lines 93-124: '[BUG][error] Glob errors silently ignored; nil info causes panic' and Lines 127-133: '[BUG][error] os.Remove errors silently ignored' — both caught

expectations.text: Review catches either the missing bytes import (compile error) or deprecated ioutil.ReadFile
expectations.evidence: Lines 59-64: '[BUG][error] bytes package not imported — code will not compile' AND Lines 147-157: '[CODE QUALITY][info] ioutil.ReadFile is deprecated'

expectations.text: Path traversal and/or command injection findings are marked as error or critical severity
expectations.evidence: [SECURITY][error] labels on both path traversal (line 7) and command injection (line 27) findings
